boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on assay-acceptance status
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Abstract assay-acceptance status unverified per policy
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Closure lacks explicit assay-acceptance status before shipment

final_answer: Source records show visible deviation alert and closure lacking explicit assay-acceptance status match required by STD-FJO-086. BATCH-FJO-086 and CLOSE-FJO-086 confirm batch, assay, criterion and date but omit the abstract acceptance field. Boundary remains open. Action may not proceed until defect resolved.
